notes: Recognisable as the same row of squid mantles with chromatophore stippling, but only 3 of 4 individuals are drawn and the arm crowns are almost entirely missing.
specific_issues: Input has 4 squid laid horizontally; output shows only 3
Arms and tentacles on the right side are truncated or missing entirely — no recognisable arm crown on any individual
Chromatophore patches rendered as noisy worm-like squiggles rather than clean FAO stipple
Bottom squid lacks an eye and any head detail
Mantle silhouettes have small breaks and stray contour fragments
Fin shape on bottom squid reads as a blunt lobe rather than the photo's tapered fin
No suckers or arm segmentation visible where arms do appear
Overall reads as a partial photo-trace rather than an FAO scientific plate
